message:

Pick up latest modifications from concurrent agent work sessions:

- src/rpc.rs: minor RPC adjustments
- tests/common/harness.rs: test harness updates
- .beads/issues.jsonl: task state sync

 {"id":"bd-2b1f","title":"Implement pi.registerCommand() for extension slash commands","description":"Allow extensions to register custom slash commands that integrate with the TUI.

## API Spec (from legacy)
```typescript
pi.registerCommand(name, {
  description: string,
  handler: (args, ctx) => Promise<void>,
  getArgumentCompletions?: (prefix) => CompletionItem[]
});
```

## Implementation Requirements
1. CommandRegistry in extension runtime to store registered commands
2. Hostcall handler for 'registerCommand' that validates and stores
3. Integration with autocomplete system (src/autocomplete.rs)
4. Integration with slash command processor (src/interactive.rs)
5. Command execution via extension runtime (JS handler)

## Data Flow
1. Extension calls pi.registerCommand('mycommand', {...})
2. Hostcall stores in CommandRegistry
3. /mycommand shows in autocomplete suggestions
4. User types /mycommand args
5. Interactive processor detects extension command
6. Invokes JS handler with args and ExtensionCommandContext

## Test Plan
- Unit test: registerCommand stores command metadata
- Integration test: registered command appears in autocomplete
- E2E test: /mycommand executes JS handler

## Files to Modify
- src/extensions.rs (CommandRegistry)
- src/extensions_js.rs (hostcall handler)
- src/autocomplete.rs (include extension commands)
- src/interactive.rs (dispatch to extension handler)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"ScarletCrane","created_at":"2026-02-04T21:09:36.671947075Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-05T04:21:09.889724131Z","closed_at":"2026-02-05T04:21:09.889661023Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2b1f","depends_on_id":"bd-2bnc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-05T04:20:53Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-2b1f","depends_on_id":"bd-37qz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-05T04:20:53Z","created_by":"import"}]}
